    AbstractNField.substringToValue(AbstractNField delimiter)
    Extracts a substring from the current value of the field instance representation of this object up to the first occurrence of the given delimiter.
    StringValue
    AbstractNField.substringToValue(String delimiter)
    Extracts a substring from the current value of the field instance up to, but not including, the first occurrence of the specified delimiter.
    StringValue

    Converts the string value of the current value of the field instance to lowercase.

    Converts the string value of the current value of the field instance to uppercase.
